title: Binding v1alpha1
description: Selects Profiles for a context. Does not establish host precedence (docs/product/requirements.md §4.2).

match.description: Exactly one of repository or repositoryGlob must be set -- mutually exclusive alternatives for naming which repository context(s) this Binding selects, not independent filters. repository (the original, still-fully-supported mode) requires an exact match; repositoryGlob (issue: closes the 'apply to every checkout under a prefix, e.g. ~/workspace/**, including worktrees created later' gap that one Binding = one literal repository could not express) matches via the same doublestar-style '**'/'*' segment grammar paths already uses.
